## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and collaboration between GrowthX and Homebase, focusing on SEO, link building, and content creation initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/F1BpS77LmHemsdDEhGvCA6cU4gZHAE6e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Glossary project: Create a small business glossary starting with payroll terms, expanding to general business terms, with potential for AI-powered chatbot integration](https://fathom.video/share/F1BpS77LmHemsdDEhGvCA6cU4gZHAE6e?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: Focus on creating content for new "starter" section of Homebase site, including business-specific information and government grants](https://fathom.video/share/F1BpS77LmHemsdDEhGvCA6cU4gZHAE6e?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Case studies: Explore multimedia options, including AI-generated audio summaries and video testimonials](https://fathom.video/share/F1BpS77LmHemsdDEhGvCA6cU4gZHAE6e?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Link building: Prioritize backlink strategy for key pages, especially payroll-related content](https://fathom.video/share/F1BpS77LmHemsdDEhGvCA6cU4gZHAE6e?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
